title: 20pc Insulated Test Lead Cable with Alligator Clips Colorful Set
description:
The Universal Tool Insulated Lead Cable with Alligator Clips is a great addition for any electrical tools set! Each 20" test lead in this 20 pack has two crimped, insulated 1.5" alligator clips with springs for a safe, secure hold. The leads feature red, green, black, white, and yellow 22 gauge insulation to prevent shorting or a dangerous shock. These test leads with alligator clips are perfect for electronics, circuits, automotive, batteries, and electrical projects.
